flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Waukesha County Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Waukesha County Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4k → 5.0k).
